description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 27, 2024 at 2:52 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on San Vicente Boulevard at Wilshire Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped in traffic for a red light in the leftmost through lane of southeastbound San Vicente Boulevard at the 
intersection with Wilshire Boulevard. When the light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded into the intersection. Simultaneously, a 
passenger car traveling in the rightmost dedicated left turn lane (the left adjacent lane to the Waymo AV) proceeded straight into the 
intersection and partially entered the leftmost through lane ahead of the Waymo AV. The passenger side of the passenger car then made 
contact with the driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
